heading: Short title
label: 30901 Short title
text: This chapter may be cited as the “Suits in Admiralty Act”.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)3090146 App.:741 note.

Short Title, , which enacted chapter 20 (§ 741 et seq.) of the former Appendix to this title, was popularly known as the “Suits in Admiralty Act”, prior to being repealed and restated in this chapter by , §§ 6(c), 19, , , 1710.Act Mar. 9, 1920, ch. 9541 Stat. 525Pub. L. 109–304120 Stat. 1509Oct. 6, 2006
